text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 53 

OSTEOPOROSIS 

LABEL: Osteoporosis With or Without Pathological Fracture End-of-Year Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
osteoporosis with or without pathological fracture as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: OSTEOPOROSIS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW
